message:
fix: useMetricsHistory interval resets on every MCP poll (#5797)

Store clusters, podIssues, gpuNodes in refs so the snapshot interval
effect runs only on mount. Previously, new array references from MCP
hooks caused the interval to reset every 30s, preventing snapshots
from accumulating at the configured interval (e.g. 10 minutes).

Fixes #5781

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
